name: sync-plugin
description: 飞书 ↔ Obsidian 知识库同步闭环（浏览器扩展 + OB 插件，通过 localhost HTTP 通信）

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:ob && npm run build:ext
scripts.test:protocol: npm run build:shared && node --test scripts/protocol-uri-test.mjs scripts/protocol-compat-test.mjs
scripts.test:ob: npm run build:ob && npm test -w @sync/ob-plugin && npm run typecheck:ob
scripts.test:ext: npm run typecheck:ext && npm run test:storage -w @sync/extension
scripts.test: npm run test:extractor && npm run test:protocol && npm run test:ob && npm run test:ext && npm run test:version
